title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 27 August 2024.

items.title: **Nintendo Indie World and Partner Showcase** Today
bullets: 40-minute broadcast to focus on third-party and indie games
Combined Nintendo Direct Partner Showcase, which focuses on big games from non-Nintendo developers, and an Indie World Showcase, which spotlights projects from smaller creative teams

items.title: **Taiko no Tatsujin: Rhythm Festival** launches November 7 on Steam, PS5, and Xbox Series S/X
bullets: Taiko Music Pass available at launch (700+ song subscription service)
76 built-in songs (Include Decisive Battle and Cruel Angel's Thesis from Evangelion)
Pre-Order comes with Namco Game Music Pack
No word on if controllers will be sold for this version of the game Update: Special Controllers available: https://x.com/Wario64/status/1828247945008857179
First time Taiko no Tatsujin is on Steam (outside of the three song "arcade" version in Yakuza 5)

items.title: **Black Myth: Wukong** has sold 10 million copies worldwide
bullets: Milestone reached in five days since release

items.title: **LEGO Horizon Adventures** is launching November 14
bullets: Information accidentally posted early on the Playstation home page entry for the game
